title: All The Enchantments Together
description: Tired of choosing between enchantments? With this datapack, all enchantment conflicts are removed—combine anything with anything to craft truly overpowered gear!
body:
**disclaimer**
I will no longer be updating the data pack i am switching this over to a plugin


Tired of choosing between enchantments? With this datapack, all enchantment conflicts are removed—combine anything with anything to craft truly overpowered gear! (channeling and riptide are not encluded)

**Contacting Me**
If you have any questions, comments, requests or sugestions please contact me on my datapack and resource pack server https://discord.gg/RrPNmusw
